[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: The Metaphor of Palestine
[METADATA/INTRO]: The Metaphor of Palestine Foreign Images and Native Feelings...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The Metaphor of Palestine 
 Foreign Images and Native Feelings 
 The viral image of a protestor using a military policeman’s glass shield as a mirror was not tied to Gaza. 
 Many were quick to point that out online, shortly after posting the picture on my Instagram page. The image pulled me in seconds after seeing it for the first time, summoning feelings that spanned between awe and indignation. 
 It was, at once, emotionally seductive and urgent. Speaking powerfully to the season of protest blooming across college campuses and sonic youth of courage that spoke over the cowardice of civil rights elders.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2019-12-23
[TITLE]: 2016 photo taken in Chile is being shared as a photo from Jamia Protests against CAA - FACTLY
[METADATA/INTRO]: An image of a girl staring at a man in uniform is being shared widely on social media with a claim that it was taken at Jamia Protests against the Citizenship (Amendment) Act, 2019. Let’s try to analyze the claim...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: An image of a girl staring at a man in uniform is being shared widely on social media with a claim that it was taken at Jamia Protests against the Citizenship (Amendment) Act, 2019. Let’s try to analyze the claim made in the post. 
 Claim: ‘Staring girl’ photo taken at Jamia Protests against CAA. 
 Fact: The photo in the post is an old one and was taken in 2016 during a pro-democracy protest in Santiago (Chile). Hence the claim made in the post is FALSE. 
 When the photo was run through the Yandex Reverse Image Search, the same photo was found in an article by ‘The Sun’. In the article, the photo has the following description: ‘A demonstrator looks at a riot officer during protests in Chile in September 2016’. So, when searched with the relevant keywords, the same photo was also found in a CNN article, published in 2016. So, it is not related to any protests in India.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-01-02
[TITLE]: India Times: 36 Powerful Images Of Women Protesters Leading From The Front Across The World – Confluence Daily
[METADATA/INTRO]: India Times: 36 Powerful Images Of Women Protesters Leading From The Front Across The World Reading Time: 6 minutes...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: 18. Amazing photo from clashes between demonstrators & police in Macedonia. 
 19. A woman gestures to members of the security forces during a protest against Chile’s state economic model, in Santiago, Chile. 
 20. A woman confronts a member of the security forces during a protest against Chile’s government in Santiago, Chile. 
 21. A woman gestures in front of police during a protest against Chile’s government in Valparaiso, Chile. 
 22. 22-year-old Alaa Salah, an architecture student in Khartoum, is leading powerful protest chants against President Omar al-Bashir, addresses protesters during a demonstration in front of the military headquarters in the capital Khartoum.
